title: Research: @Mrcryptoxwhale — Claude recomenda prediction markets para $1k

context.description:
## Objetivo
Pesquisa de oportunidade financeira/estrategica identificada em tweet. Explorar em profundidade e responder as 3 perguntas obrigatorias.

## Contexto
- **Tweet original:** https://x.com/Mrcryptoxwhale/status/2031238619181064624?s=20
- **Autor:** @Mrcryptoxwhale
- **Texto do tweet:** HE ASKED CLAUDE WHERE TO PUT $1,000 🤯

NOT STOCKS.
NOT CRYPTO.

CLAUDE’S ANSWER:

BUY PREDICTION MARKET EVENTS PRICED UNDER 3¢

$1,000 → $98,000

SOMETIMES THE BIGGEST OPPORTUNITIES ARE HIDING WHERE NO ON
